PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?year WHERE {
  ?athlete wdt:P27 wd:Q9714 .
  ?medal wdt:P1346 ?athlete .
  ?medal wdt:P1093 ?event .
  ?event rdfs:label ?eventName .
  FILTER(LANG(?eventName) = "en")
  .
  FILTER(REGEX(STR(?eventName) , "48[- ]*kg" , "i"))
  .
  ?event wdt:P126 ?olympicGames .
  ?olympicGames wdt:P585 ?eventDate .
  BIND(year(?eventDate) AS ?year)
}
